notes: Bound-booklet export (v0.3-booklet.md): turn a series into a home-bindable A5-on-A4 booklet. Big multi-turn feature; Task 3 (imposed render) + Task 4 (webfont) need an author physical-printer check (gated).

chunks.notes: TDD: tools/test-booklet.js (exact assertions, test-manifest idiom) FAIL -> js/booklet.js pure impose()/sequential() -> PASS. impose(8)=[{front:[8,1],back:[2,7]},{front:[6,3],back:[4,5]}]; impose(6) pads to 8 with nulls. Verify: node tools/test-booklet.js; all suites green. Idempotent: js/booklet.js exists with impose in api.

Registry 'Bind into a booklet' selection (letters with text only; textless disabled+reason), date order + up/down reorder (keyboard), compose logical pages (title / per-letter facts+letter / plates / colophon), paginate by measuring against the A5 content box. Verify: node --check; browser. BIG.

Two print modes: sequential (A5 two-up on A4 landscape) + signature (impose() order, front/back positioned). Duplex insets (from PROGRESS physical notes), single-signature guidance, fold-and-sew instructions + pamphlet-stitch SVG. Verify: browser PDF both modes. Physical fold-check = AUTHOR GATE. BIG.
/qa PDF both modes + browser; PROGRESS/plan/vault docs. Physical duplex fold-check is author-gated. Task 4 (webfont decision) is author-gated on print evidence — deferred, noted.

resume_hint: Start b1-imposition (pure TDD, self-contained). Then b2-composer, b3-render (both big), b4-qa. Task 3 physical fold-check + Task 4 webfont are author-gated. Token three-way-break decision (separate) is with the author (recommended Option B, two identical halves).
